title: The result of anti disk hash join is wrong
poc: CREATE TABLE t1 (id int primary key, col1 varchar(200));
CREATE TABLE t2 (id int primary key, col1 varchar(200));

create procedure and insert data
DELIMITER //
CREATE PROCEDURE insert_data ()
BEGIN
DECLARE num int;

DO
INSERT INTO t2 VALUES (num, md5(rand()));
select * from t1 left join t2 on t1.col1 = t2.col1 where t2.id is null;
key_bug_features: Anti join with null value in join-key
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id int primary key, col1 varchar(200), col2 int DEFAULT NULL);
CREATE TABLE t4 (id int primary key, col1 varchar(200), col2 int NOT NULL);
SELECT * FROM t3 LEFT JOIN t4 ON t3.col1 = t4.col1 WHERE t4.id IS NULL;
